hero.title: Your Discord community already has the knowledge. Give it a voice.
hero.sub: Share2Brain automatically indexes links shared across your channels and answers any member in natural language — with verifiable citations, streaming responses and full control via Discord roles.

valuesTitle: Knowledge that dies in the scroll, answers you can verify

vp.t: Your community already has the knowledge. Make it searchable.
vp.d: Share2Brain detects every link shared in Discord, fetches and chunks its content, and indexes it in a pgvector knowledge base. Your community builds the knowledge base without changing how they work.
Every answer includes traceable citations to the original chunk: channel, author, date and link. The agent streams responses so members see the answer form in real time.
Discord roles map to channels inside the agent. Every query respects those permissions: each member only gets answers from channels they can access. RBAC enforced on every vector query.

featuresTitle: Everything you need to let your community query its own knowledge

features.d: The RAG agent streams answers citing indexed fragments. If it can't find an answer, it says so.
Query the entire knowledge base with pgvector. No exact keywords needed.
Roles define which channels each member sees. RBAC on every query.
Slack and Telegram alerts when new content is indexed.
Unread badges per member and per channel. Know what's left to read.
Indexing activity, per-channel coverage and top contributors.
OAuth2 with your Discord app. Optional guest access available.
7 services in one docker-compose up. Backend, bot, workers, web, Postgres, Redis, nginx.

howTitle: An agent that reasons, not a bot that repeats
howSub: Share2Brain's core is a Reason-Act-Observe loop built with LangGraph. The agent analyzes the query, decides which tools to use and observes results until it resolves the query — it never guesses.

loopSteps.d: The runtime assembles the full context —system prompt, available tools, history and retrieved chunks— and calls the model to decide the next step.
loopSteps.label: Step 01 · reason

loopSteps.d: If the model needs information, it requests a tool. The runtime validates arguments against its Zod schema before executing. The model never touches infrastructure directly.
loopSteps.label: Step 02 · act

loopSteps.d: The result returns to the context as an observation. The loop continues until the agent has enough information to give a grounded answer.
loopSteps.label: Step 03 · observe

loopNote: All security and control live in the runtime, not the model. The model reasons; the runtime executes.

cases.d: Questions that repeat every week answer themselves, citing the exact resource. Your mod team is freed for higher-value work.
New members find rules, guides and answers without waiting for a moderator. The agent knows everything shared in channels they can access.
Questions about your product, API or config answered instantly, citing the original docs or thread. Accuracy without hallucination.
Recover conversations, decisions and resources shared in threads and channels using semantic search. No need to recall exact wording.

installTitle: One command, 7 services, zero external dependencies
installSub: A single docker-compose up starts the backend, the Discord bot, the indexing workers, the web app (search, chat, documents and stats), Postgres with pgvector, Redis and nginx. No SaaS, no subscriptions.
docsTitle: Complete docs to deploy and operate
docsSub: Everything you need to get your instance running, configure the agent and keep it in production.
archRule: Domain depends on nothing; outer layers implement its ports.
eventSub: Heavy indexing is decoupled from the runtime with Redis Streams and the Outbox pattern.
ctaTitle: Your knowledge deserves to be searchable
ctaSub: Open source, self-hosted and verifiable. Deploy your own knowledge agent with one command. Your content never leaves your infrastructure.
